changelog:
Show first-content latency and total duration together in Request Log for Claude Messages, OpenAI Chat, Responses API, and WebSearch. First-content timing starts only on real model text, reasoning, or a complete tool call, excluding SSE metadata and synthetic heartbeats; historical records display a dash when the metric is unavailable.
请求日志现在同时显示 Claude Messages、OpenAI Chat、Responses API 和 WebSearch 的首字时间与总耗时。首字计时只从真实正文、思考内容或完整工具调用开始，不计入 SSE 元数据和合成心跳；历史记录没有该指标时显示横线。
